suggests.drupal/search_api_solr: Required to use a SearchStax Solr server as a Search API backend; without it only search tracking/analytics is provided.
suggests.drupal/search_api_autocomplete: Enables the SearchStax Studio auto-suggest / typeahead feature.
suggests.drupal/search_api_attachments: Enables the SearchStax Tika-based extractor for indexing PDF/office file text.
suggests.drupal/eu_cookie_compliance: Gates SearchStudio analytics tracking behind cookie consent.
suggests.drupal/key: Stores SearchStax credentials (Solr connector + analytics) as Key entities instead of plain config.
